basics.name: Jesús Daniel Medina Cruz
basics.label: Staff Android Engineer | Client Platform & KMP Expert
basics.summary: Senior Mobile Engineer with 10 years of experience architecting highly scalable client platforms. Specialized in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) and Android SDK internals to build robust developer platforms, shared libraries, and internal tooling. Proven track record of leading modularization initiatives, implementing dependency injection frameworks, and establishing AI-native development workflows (Claude Code, Codex) to maximize engineering velocity in high-scale fintech and regulated environments.

work.name: HansellApp
work.summary: Lead the cross-platform technical strategy for an All-in-One Real Estate Management Suite, establishing core library patterns and scaling feature velocity.
responsibilities: Reduced cross-platform feature development time by 34% by architecting a shared business logic layer using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), ensuring 100% parity across Android and iOS.
Optimized developer velocity and code quality by integrating AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Copilot) and workflows into the daily engineering cycle.
Improved UI state predictability and modular maintainability by enforcing MVVM architecture, structured concurrency, and Coroutines/Flow patterns.
Accelerated production release frequency by 42% by automating CI/CD build pipelines and establishing automated performance regression testing.

work.name: Bubble
work.position: Senior Android Software Consultant (Fintech & Regulated Systems)
work.summary: Provided hands-on engineering, codebase modernization, and strategic guidance for high-scale organizations in Fintech, MedTech, and Mobile Platforms.
highlights: Bitso (Fintech/Growth): Owned the integration of CleverTap user engagement SDK utilizing Kotlin Multiplatform to achieve a unified, high-performing codebase for both Android and iOS.
Dexcom (Medical/Regulated): Championed robust testing practices and SDK development for high-trust continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) apps, maintaining 99.94% crash-free sessions.
Beek.io (KMP Core): Architected a custom cross-platform audio player SDK using KMP, Ktor, Realm, Jetpack Compose, and SwiftUI.
responsibilities: Spearheaded Android codebase modernization, migrating legacy monolithic codebases into modular Kotlin architectures and reducing technical debt by 31%.
Led dependency injection implementation, deep linking strategies, and app lifecycle optimizations to ensure robust client platform scaling.
Created custom Gradle plugins to standardize build configurations and automated testing suites (Circle CI, Fastlane, Paparazzi) across multiple engineering teams.
Optimized user engagement by 28% by architecting an AI-driven personalization engine using Firebase Remote Config and advanced telemetry.

work.name: Insulet Corporation
work.summary: Spearheaded the development of the VIEW app, an innovative, high-security mobile solution empowering caregivers to remotely monitor patient health data in real-time.
responsibilities: Engineered high-concurrency, low-latency data processing pipelines for real-time diabetes health monitoring at scale, ensuring extreme reliability in a regulated medical environment.
Optimized multithreading performance and resolved critical memory leaks in the Android domain layer, reducing memory footprint by 37%.
Streamlined shared platform layers using Kotlin and Java to increase code reuse across Android and iOS devices.

work.name: arkusnexus
work.summary: Contributed to Rosy (Memory Assistant) and Simplicity (Insurtech) cross-platform applications.
responsibilities: Executed a 100% successful architectural migration from React Native to native Android, improving rendering performance and ensuring zero feature regression.
Engineered real-time vehicle telematics processing for an insurtech application, enabling dynamic insurance pricing and boosting user acquisition.

work.name: Compus Sistemas Express
work.summary: Spearheaded the digital transformation of enterprise operations by architecting a suite of applications, replacing outdated manual processes and significantly boosting efficiency.
responsibilities: Boosted development velocity by 24% for internal projects by creating reusable Android SDKs and service clients to standardize data access.
